name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.65: fixes deleting an operator failing with a foreign-key constraint error. The invitations table references operators(id), but deleteOperator only removed the operator row, so an operator with any invitation (every provisioned operator has one) could not be deleted. deleteOperator now clears the operators dependent invitations and removes the operator in a single transaction. Machines and users are still guarded in the handler and must be reassigned first. Cumulative over v5.64.
